description: Khaki coloured slip on shoes, upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heel, stitches on the seams of the toe box, padded insole for in-step comfort, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic, rubber midsole, dual density TPU outsole with grooves for grip and traction, outsole reinforced onto the heel for maximum comfortWarranty: 3 monthsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
